steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The example must name a species that was "entirely absent" — zero individuals observed — during the months stated. Check the graph for any species whose line sits on zero across the claimed period.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'barred flagtail, January': the barred flagtail had roughly 13 individuals in January, not zero. ✗
  • Choice B — 'combtooth blenny, January': the combtooth blenny had roughly 62 individuals in January. ✗
  • Choice C — 'barred flagtail, October': the barred flagtail shows approximately 3 individuals in October. ✗
  • Choice D — 'three-lined rainbowfish, January/April/July': the three-lined rainbowfish line sits directly on zero across all three of these months. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
